funding_opportunities.program_name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)
funding_opportunities.organization: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
benefits: Financial assistance up to INR 5 lakhs for proof of concept
Up to INR 20 lakhs for prototype development
Up to INR 50 lakhs for market entry and commercialization

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-recognized startup, incorporated not more than 2 years ago at time of application, must have a business idea to develop a product or service with market fit

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: MeitY GENESIS Entrepreneur-in-Residence (EiR) Cohort 2.0 at IIM Udaipur
funding_opportunities.organization: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)
benefits: Up to INR 10 Lakhs financial support over 2 years
Exposure to startup and investor network

eligibility.summary: Indian citizens who are full-time UG/PG students with entrepreneurial pursuits, or founders/co-founders of DPIIT-registered startups not more than 2 years old. Must NOT have received significant external funding exceeding INR 10 Lakhs.

incubation_support: Physical incubation at IIM Udaipur Incubation Centre
funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: T-Hub Lab32 Cohort 14 Market Readiness Program

eligibility.summary: MVP-ready and market-ready startups focused on refining Product Market Fit (PMF) and creating a robust Go-To-Market (GTM) strategy

benefits: Stage-wise incubation through ideation, validation, and venture development
Access to on-campus lab facilities at Mahindra University

eligibility.summary: Early-stage startups with working PoC or early users. Must be registered or prepared to register as Private Limited company in India. Solo and student founders welcome. Must be willing to onboard at Mahindra University campus, Hyderabad.

incubation_support: Physical incubation at Mahindra University campus

funding_opportunities.program_name: I-DAPT HUB Incubation Cohort 3 at IIT (BHU) Varanasi

benefits: INR 30 lakhs funding (INR 20 lakhs grant + INR 10 lakhs equity-based fellowship)

incubation_support: Access to IIT Kanpur research and testing facilities

funding_opportunities.program_name: Kerala Startup Mission Seed Fund Scheme
benefits: Seed funding up to INR 15 lakhs as soft loan at 6% simple interest
